nasb.text: “The Law and the Prophets were proclaimed until John; since that time the gospel of the kingdom of God has been preached, and everyone is forcing his way into it.

esv.text: “The Law and the Prophets were until John; since then     the good news of the kingdom of God is preached, and     everyone forces his way into it.

cnv.text: 律法和先知到約翰就結束了。從此，　神的國的福音就傳開了，人人都要努力進去。

ccb.text: 约翰还没有来以前，律法书和先知书是你们的准则。他出来后，上帝国的福音开始广传，人人都在努力进上帝的国。

csbs.text: “律法和先知    到约翰为止，从此神国的福音被传扬，人人都在努力争取进入它。
